caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on the chest is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by five gold stars. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him, and a black mug with red text that reads "BOSS TALK" sits on the wooden desk. In the initial frames, the man looks down at a smartphone in his hands, appearing to read or type. As the sequence progresses, he looks up and away from the device, shifting his gaze toward someone off-camera while resting one hand on the table. Throughout the scene, his attire and the surrounding studio equipment remain constant while his focus transitions from the phone to his surroundings.
